## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Rimkus and GrowthX to discuss content strategy, blog post feedback, and optimization.](https://fathom.video/share/LHcmF5vxyixc9EH-EhynUAG19h72AvyD?tab=summary&timestamp=138.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [60 blog ideas approved, 5 in production (3 ready for review, 2 coming this week)](https://fathom.video/share/LHcmF5vxyixc9EH-EhynUAG19h72AvyD?tab=summary&timestamp=138.0)
  - [Feedback on blog drafts: style adjustments, terminology refinement, and technical review process](https://fathom.video/share/LHcmF5vxyixc9EH-EhynUAG19h72AvyD?tab=summary&timestamp=194.0)
  - [Internal linking strategy discussed; some URLs to avoid (/service/ pages)](https://fathom.video/share/LHcmF5vxyixc9EH-EhynUAG19h72AvyD?tab=summary&timestamp=697.0)
  - [Looker dashboard access to be set up for performance tracking](https://fathom.video/share/LHcmF5vxyixc9EH-EhynUAG19h72AvyD?tab=summary&timestamp=1541.0)

## Topics

### Content Production Progress

  - [100 blog ideas presented in content OS](https://fathom.video/share/LHcmF5vxyixc9EH-EhynUAG19h72AvyD?tab=summary&timestamp=138.0)
  - [60 ideas approved and ready for production](https://fathom.video/share/LHcmF5vxyixc9EH-EhynUAG19h72AvyD?tab=summary&timestamp=138.0)
  - [5 blogs in production: 3 ready for review, 2 to be delivered by week's end](https://fathom.video/share/LHcmF5vxyixc9EH-EhynUAG19h72AvyD?tab=summary&timestamp=138.0)
  - [20 forensics-related topics deferred for later](https://fathom.video/share/LHcmF5vxyixc9EH-EhynUAG19h72AvyD?tab=summary&timestamp=180.0)

### Blog Post Feedback and Optimization

  - [Stylistic choices (e.g., second-person voice) don't impact SEO/AEO](https://fathom.video/share/LHcmF5vxyixc9EH-EhynUAG19h72AvyD?tab=summary&timestamp=213.0)
  - [Terminology refinement needed (e.g., "Rimkus engineers" vs. broader terms)](https://fathom.video/share/LHcmF5vxyixc9EH-EhynUAG19h72AvyD?tab=summary&timestamp=396.0)
  - [Consistency in style guide application (e.g., lifecycle vs. life cycle)](https://fathom.video/share/LHcmF5vxyixc9EH-EhynUAG19h72AvyD?tab=summary&timestamp=548.0)
  - [Disclaimer to be added at the end of each article](https://fathom.video/share/LHcmF5vxyixc9EH-EhynUAG19h72AvyD?tab=summary&timestamp=666.0)
  - [Internal linking process explained; 70-80% accuracy with room for manual adjustments](https://fathom.video/share/LHcmF5vxyixc9EH-EhynUAG19h72AvyD?tab=summary&timestamp=697.0)
  - [Capitalization and word form consistency to be addressed](https://fathom.video/share/LHcmF5vxyixc9EH-EhynUAG19h72AvyD?tab=summary&timestamp=932.0)

### Technical Content Review Process

  - [Current process involves review by technical leaders for all content](https://fathom.video/share/LHcmF5vxyixc9EH-EhynUAG19h72AvyD?tab=summary&timestamp=1431.0)
  - [Proposed new approach: publish first, then seek expert review](https://fathom.video/share/LHcmF5vxyixc9EH-EhynUAG19h72AvyD?tab=summary&timestamp=1478.0)
  - [Balance needed between efficiency and accuracy](https://fathom.video/share/LHcmF5vxyixc9EH-EhynUAG19h72AvyD?tab=summary&timestamp=1431.0)

### Content Length and Structure

  - [Typical blog length: 1,500-2,000 words](https://fathom.video/share/LHcmF5vxyixc9EH-EhynUAG19h72AvyD?tab=summary&timestamp=1247.0)
  - [Focus on comprehensive coverage and easy skimming (H2s, H3s)](https://fathom.video/share/LHcmF5vxyixc9EH-EhynUAG19h72AvyD?tab=summary&timestamp=1247.0)
  - [Meta descriptions and headers to be formatted by GrowthX team](https://fathom.video/share/LHcmF5vxyixc9EH-EhynUAG19h72AvyD?tab=summary&timestamp=1385.0)

### Performance Tracking

  - [Looker dashboard to be set up using Google Analytics and Search Console data](https://fathom.video/share/LHcmF5vxyixc9EH-EhynUAG19h72AvyD?tab=summary&timestamp=1598.0)
  - [Access issues to be resolved using personal Gmail addresses](https://fathom.video/share/LHcmF5vxyixc9EH-EhynUAG19h72AvyD?tab=summary&timestamp=1541.0)
